Book Appointment

Exceptional Dental Care, Centered On You.

Experience a new standard of comfort and quality at Surya Dental Care. Your smile is our priority in our serene, patient-focused environment.

Schedule Your Visit

A Reassuring & Calm Environment

At Surya Dental Care, we understand that a visit to the dentist can be daunting. That's why we've cultivated a genuinely attentive and caring atmosphere. Our team, from our expert dentists to our supportive staff, is dedicated to ensuring you feel completely at ease.

We prioritize clear communication, taking the time to thoroughly explain every procedure. This personalized approach helps even the most anxious patients feel comfortable and confident in their care.

Expert Team
Patient Comfort
Modern Tech

Our Comprehensive Services

From routine check-ups to advanced treatments, we offer a wide range of high-quality dental services tailored to your individual needs.

General Dentistry

Thorough cleanings, fillings, and preventative care to maintain your oral health.

Cosmetic Dentistry

Enhance your smile with teeth whitening, veneers, and smile makeovers.

Dental Implants

Permanent, natural-looking solutions for missing teeth, handled with expert care.

Anxiety-Free Care

A calm, reassuring environment designed to make every patient feel comfortable.

Punctual Service

We value your time with efficient, on-schedule appointments and minimal waiting.

Clean & Welcoming

Our state-of-the-art facility is impeccably clean, from reception to treatment rooms.

Meet Our Caring Team

Led by Dr. Nehla and Dr. Senthil Kumar, our professional and genuinely attentive team is the heart of our practice.

Dr. Senthil Kumar, MDS

Implantologist

Dr. Nehla

General Dentist

Dental Hygienist
